chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 779 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 11. 2. For orders on CMA 541/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 542/2023. 26.01.2026 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed, advocate for the applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press the instant reference application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge M. Khan
